\tzpentry{ID4875}{Potential Energy Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4875 introduces Potential Energy Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$U_{tri} = \\exp\\left( -i\\frac{\\pi}{8} \\sigma_z^{(1)} \\otimes \\sigma_z^{(2)} \\otimes \\sigma_z^{(3)} \\right)$
\]
